title: Shrug it Off - STB edition
body:
This mod has been merged into the original mod "Shrug It Off". This page will no longer be updated.
Lumberjacksparrow and I have decided to join our efforts and avoid an unnecessary split feature-wise.

The mod will no longer be available here, download it from [https://modrinth.com/mod/shrug-it-off](https://modrinth.com/mod/shrug-it-off)
